payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Front-facing stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with two vertical black handles and a built-in water/ice dispenser on the left door; reflective, slightly smudged surface with visible light scratches and reflections; largely visible in the crop but slightly edge-cropped at the top — estimated ~1.2 m from the camera.
